title: VRx
body:
# The Ultimate VR Modpack  

## About
VRx is the ultimate VR modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1, designed to be played in VR & Flatscreen simultaneously!

## Features
- [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) for easy Multiplayer
- Simultaneously play VR & Flatscreen
- Vanilla+ Style
- Voice Chat
- Enhanced SFX
- And more!

## Requirements
- [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/about/) & [SteamVR](https://store.steampowered.com/app/250820)
- A SteamVR Compatible Headset
- A pretty powerful computer, VR isn't easy to run
- 6 GB of RAM allocated to Minecraft is recommended as a minimum.
  
  
A guide on how to play Vivecraft is available [here](https://www.vivecraft.org/how-to-play/) on the Vivecraft website.  
  
Please let me know if you have any suggestions for mods to add!
